title: nf-core/pixelator pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.input

sample.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

panel.errorMessage: panel or panel_file must be specified

panel_file.description: Optional panel file path. Empty string allowed. If set, must end with .csv, .tsv, .yaml, or .yml and contain no spaces.
panel_file.errorMessage: Panel file must either be left empty or cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.csv', '.tsv' or '.yaml'

fastq_1.errorMessage: FastQ file for reads 1 must be provided, cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz'

fastq_2.errorMessage: FastQ file for reads 2 cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz'
fastq_2.description: Optional FASTQ(.gz) path for read 2 (no spaces).

condition.description: Optional experimental condition for the sample.

reference_condition.description: Optional reference condition for differential analysis.

alternative_condition.description: Optional alternative condition for the sample.
